description_long: This is a rectangular, three-story hostel building constructed primarily from light gray brick, featuring a flat roof and a modern, utilitarian design. The front facade includes a prominent main entrance with a small set of steps, flanked by symmetrical rows of rectangular windows. The building is surrounded by paved areas, including a parking lot with several cars, landscaped greenery, and a fenced outdoor patio area with seating and planters. The rear of the building features a larger open terrace with outdoor furniture and trees, providing communal outdoor space for residents. The overall setting is urban, with the hostel integrated into a streetscape that includes sidewalks, driveways, and adjacent vegetation.
description: A modern, three-story rectangular hostel with light gray brick walls, flat roof, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by parking, greenery, and outdoor communal spaces.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, symmetrical window rows, a parking area with cars, and landscaped planters.
description_view_1: The left side reveals the fenced outdoor patio with seating, planters, and trees, as well as the building's side wall.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the large open terrace with outdoor furniture, additional parking, and more greenery.
description_view_3: The right side displays the parking lot, driveway, and a partial view of the terrace and main entrance.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is centrally located on the front facade, accessed by a small set of steps. It features a double door with a light-colored frame, flanked by simple rectangular windows and minimal decorative elements. The entrance is slightly recessed and marked by a modest overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are rectangular and symmetrically arranged in horizontal rows across all visible facades. Each floor has a consistent pattern, with evenly spaced windows of similar size and style, featuring simple frames and no visible shutters or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary utilitarian with modern influences, characterized by clean lines, flat roof, and minimal ornamentation.
